notes: gs-loc Quick Controls, all-native one-tap: Warm start (connect Shadowrocket, then auto-checks your spoof on return), Re-teleport to last spot, and Flush (jumps to Location Services). Honest after on-device testing: the flush is the manual LS toggle - Wi-Fi/Airplane don't move it - and a Back-Tap-bound Teleport shortcut gives a hands-free push.
